name: U S GLOBAL INVESTORS INC
business: U.S. Global Investors, Inc. provides investment advisory and administrative services to mutual funds and ETFs, generating revenue from management fees and investment income. The company also invests for its own account in securities and other instruments to add growth to its cash position.
namedCustomers: U.S. Global GO GOLD and Precious Metal Miners ETF
U.S. Global Sea to Sky Cargo ETF
U.S. Global Technology and Aerospace & Defense ETF

exposures.sentence: The Jets ETF invests in airline-related stocks, including global airline carriers, airport operators and aircraft manufacturers.
U.S. Global GO GOLD and Precious Metal Miners ETF (ticker GOAU), which invests in companies engaged in the production of precious metals
The Company has traditionally focused on gold mining and exploration, natural resources, and emerging markets.
U.S. Global Technology and Aerospace & Defense ETF (ticker WAR), which invests in frontier sectors including emerging technologies, electronic warfare, aerospace, and defense.
U.S. Global Technology and Aerospace & Defense ETF (ticker WAR), which invests in frontier sectors including emerging technologies, electronic warfare, aerospace, and defense.
U.S. Global Sea to Sky Cargo ETF (ticker SEA), which concentrates on the global sea shipping and air freight industries.
The Travel UCITS ETF (ticker TRIP), which concentrates on the travel industry.
The Company has indirect exposure to the cryptocurrency markets through its investments.

catalysts.event: Renewal of USGIF advisory and administrative agreements
catalysts.sentence: The investment advisory and related contracts between the Company and USGIF have been renewed through September 2025.

catalysts.event: Renewal of U.S.-based ETF advisory agreements
catalysts.sentence: The advisory agreements for the U.S.-based ETFs have been renewed through July 2026.

catalysts.event: Expense limitation for U.S. Global Sea to Sky Cargo ETF
catalysts.sentence: The Company has agreed to contractually limit the expenses of the U.S. Global Sea to Sky Cargo ETF through April 2026.
the Board of Directors has authorized a monthly dividend of $0.0075 per share from July 2025 through September 2025.
The credit agreement will expire on May 31, 2026, and the Company intends to renew it biennially.

tamClaims.claim: Approximately 8,400 domestically registered open-end investment companies and 3,900 exchange-traded funds as of end of 2024.
tamClaims.sentence: According to the Investment Company Institute, at the end of 2024 there were approximately 8,400 domestically registered open-end investment companies and approximately 3,900 exchange-traded funds of varying sizes and investment policies, whose shares are being offered to the public in the U.S.
